title: Study Abroad Pathway
summary: From Assam/NE India to international film education — scholarships, visas, and program selection.
target_audience: ST candidates from Northeast India seeking affordable international film education

steps.title: Assess Your Profile & Budget Band
steps.summary: Determine 0-3L, 4-6L, or 7-9L feasibility. Confirm ST certificate, NOS eligibility, portfolio readiness.

steps.title: Research Programs & Countries
steps.summary: Compare Germany (0 tuition), India (MGR/DBHRGFTI), and scholarship-heavy destinations.

steps.title: Apply for Scholarships (NOS / DAAD)
steps.summary: NOS deadline typically May-June. DAAD applications parallel with university admission.

steps.title: Secure Admission & Visa
steps.summary: University admission letter → attestation in Guwahati → visa application via VFS.

title: Become a Film Editor
summary: Training pathways from NE India to professional editing — diplomas, online tools, and festival circuits.
target_audience: Aspiring editors with basic computer skills

steps.title: Build Foundational Skills
steps.summary: Learn Premiere Pro / DaVinci Resolve. Edit short docs from local NE stories.

steps.title: Formal Training (Diploma or Online)
steps.summary: MGR Chennai Editing Diploma (~₹15k/yr) or online certifications.

steps.title: Portfolio & Festival Submissions
steps.summary: Submit to Tasveer, local NE festivals, build 3-5 strong edited pieces.

title: Become a Documentary Filmmaker
summary: From NE India stories to international documentary funding and festival premiere.

steps.title: Develop Cultural Story & Treatment
steps.summary: Root story in Assam/NE oral traditions, indigenous representation, ground realities.

steps.title: Apply to Development Labs
steps.summary: IDFA Bertha Fund, Berlinale Talents, Sundance Documentary Fund.

steps.title: Production Funding & Co-production
steps.summary: NFDC Film Bazaar, co-pro markets, broadcast partnerships (Doordarshan, regional).

title: Film Funding Pathway
summary: Navigate grants, fellowships, and co-production funding for independent filmmakers.

steps.title: ST-Specific & India Grants
steps.summary: NOS, NFDC, state film finance, Reborn India Short Film Fund.

steps.title: International Grants
steps.summary: IDFA Bertha, Hubert Bals Fund, Sundance, Asian Cinema Fund.

title: Festival Strategy Pathway
summary: Strategic festival submission and networking for emerging filmmakers.

steps.title: Tier Your Festivals
steps.summary: A-list (Berlinale, Cannes) → Regional (IFFI, MIFF) → Niche (doc festivals).

steps.title: Submit to Labs & Markets
steps.summary: Film Bazaar, Torino, Berlinale Talents for networking beyond competition.

title: Low Budget Filmmaker Pathway
summary: Make films on minimal budget from NE India — 0-3L education + local production strategies.

steps.title: Minimize Education Cost
steps.summary: DBHRGFTI, MGR Chennai, Germany public MA, online certifications.

steps.title: Local Production Networks
steps.summary: Guwahati crew, NE co-producers, community screening circuits.

steps.title: Micro-Grants & Short Film Funds
steps.summary: Reborn India (₹1L), Tasveer, NFDC shorts support.
